name: Headphones — Gemini picks Sony WH-1000XM5 with a battery claim
description: Act 3 montage scenario. User asks Gemini for over-ear ANC headphones under $300.

input.userPrompt: ANC over-ear headphones under $300 for music and calls — battery life, comfort, and mic quality matter most
input.raw: The Sony WH-1000XM5 is the clear pick here. You get industry-leading active noise cancellation, up to 40 hours of battery with ANC off, a comfortable fit for long sessions, and excellent microphone quality for calls. At around $299, it just fits your budget.

expected.note: Sony WH-1000XM5 is rated 30 hours with ANC on / 40 hours with ANC off — the 40-hour figure misleads when the user explicitly wants ANC on.
